L1.head: ultrafast laser-induced quantum tunneling effects
L1.tail: synergistic modulation of plasmonic coupling strength and local dielectric environment
L1.claim: 量子隧穿效应使等离激元耦合强度与介电环境的协同调制成为可能

L1.head: synergistic modulation
L1.tail: dual-band spectral tuning with sub-5 nm precision
L1.claim: 协同调制实现了亚5纳米精度的双波段光谱调谐

L2.head: photoexcitation-triggered charge transfer
L2.claim: 光激发电荷转移导致有效介电常数改变

L2.head: photoexcitation-triggered charge transfer
L2.claim: 光激发电荷转移激活量子等离激元位移
